article.title: Starmer warns Burnham not to borrow to fund defence as he reveals £15bn plan

article.title: US supreme court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump agenda

article.title: Trump administration puts religious freedom at heart of US health policy
article.summary: Critics say the new focus could reshape LGBTQ+ healthcare, abortion access and vaccine policy

article.title: After U.S.-Iran War, Oman Is Said to Propose Strait of Hormuz Fee Plan
article.summary: Under the proposal, Iran and Oman would collect payment for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, according to officials and diplomats with knowledge of the matter.

article.title: German leftwing terrorism on the rise, spy agency warns
article.summary: Increase in violent incidents comes in response to far-right extremism and Israeli actions in Middle East

article.title: NCTV zeer bezorgd over nihilistisch extremisme en gewelddadige extremisten die menen dat ‘een kwaadaardige elite burgers onderdrukt’
article.summary: Het dreigingsniveau voor terroristisch geweld is stabiel, maar „substantieel”, meldt de NCTV. De oorlog in Iran vergroot de kans op aanslagen op Amerikaanse en Joodse doelwitten, aldus het halfjaarlijkse Dreigingsbeeld Terrorisme Nederland . Het rapport heeft voor het eerst een hoofdstuk over ‘nihilistisch extremisme’.

article.title: Shortages of Rescue Equipment Hampered Venezuela’s Earthquake Response
article.summary: Residents appealed for excavators, generators and specialized rescue tools as civilians have stepped in to supply crews working through the rubble.

article.title: After Ukraine strikes refineries, Putin admits to 'a certain shortage' of fuel
article.summary: The anger of Russians searching for gas at stations is beginning to emerge on social media. The Russian leader has admitted for the first time the impact of the deep-strike operations carried out by Kyiv, while downplaying them.

items.title: ‘He isn’t political’: the Ukrainian-born oligarch targeted by a Monaco bomber
items.summary: Questions remain as to why somebody would want to kill Vadym Iermolaiev, who has a personal fortune of $225m

items.title: Rochdale grooming gang ringleader cannot be deported, victims told
items.summary: Provisions in Immigration Act prevent Shabir Ahmed, due to be released, from being removed to Pakistan

items.title: Starmer’s £15bn defence plan leaves short-term gaps, say former officers
items.summary: UK’s large military investments are aimed at countering China, but questions remain about ability to withstand Russian threat

items.title: I’m Gay, Not Queer. It Matters.
items.summary: Polyamorous? Queer. Vaguely uncomfortable with gender expectations? Possibly queer, too.

items.title: ‘Four white presenters feels retro’ – is the BBC Today programme doomed?
items.summary: With bosses at the BBC prioritising social media platforms over radio, things feel apocalyptic at the broadcaster’s flagship news show – especially given the lack of diversity. Is this it?

items.title: Supreme Court upholds principle that almost all born on U.S. soil are American
items.summary: If the court had struck down birthright citizenship and upheld President Donald Trump’s executive order, the ruling would have had sweeping political, economic and social ramifications.

items.title: Why A.I. Won’t Steal All Our Jobs
items.summary: Congratulations. You’re irreplaceable.

items.title: Schiphol kiest drie grondafhandelaars en breekt met prijsvechtersmodel
items.summary: Na de chaos van de zomer van 2022, met lange rijen en geschrapte vluchten door personeelstekorten, besloten Schiphol en het kabinet om het aantal facilitaire bedrijven terug te dringen van zes naar drie. Het is een poging een einde te maken aan de ‘race naar de bodem’.

items.title: WhatsApp-gebruikers kunnen binnenkort gebruikersnamen uitwisselen in plaats van telefoonnummers
Een hittegolf, noodhulp na aardbevingen en Trumps mislukte miljoenenrenovatie: dit is de maand juni in beeld
items.summary: Dagelijks stromen duizenden foto’s uit de hele wereld onze beeldbanken binnen. Van gruwelijke actualiteit tot verstilde landschappen, van breaking news tot ogenschijnlijk kleine momenten. Elke maand selecteert de fotoredactie van NRC de foto’s die de meeste indruk maakten.

items.title: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
items.summary: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.
